sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43080" key="e(tairi/deia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑταιρ-ίδεια</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἱερά</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <sense id="n43080.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the festival of</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Ζεὺς ἑταιρεῖος</foreign> at Magnesia, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1392.tlg001:25" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hegesand.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">25</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
